title: codon_stats input — aligned CDS pair
description: Logical record consumed by codon_stats. Two physical formats are accepted: TSV (--pairs) and multi-FASTA (--fasta). Both encode the same record: a pair_id and two equal-length aligned coding sequences over alphabet {A,C,G,T,-}; ambiguity codes are tolerated but those codons are skipped.

pair_id.description: Identifier for the pair (e.g. orthologue group id, gene id). In FASTA mode, derived from the first header by stripping trailing _A/_B/_a/_b/_1/_2.

seqA.description: Aligned CDS, length must be a multiple of 3 ideally; trailing partial codon is dropped. Same length as seqB.

seqB.description: Aligned CDS, same length as seqA.

tsv.description: Plain TSV passed via --pairs. Optional header row starting with 'pair_id'. Lines starting with '#' are skipped.

fasta.description: Multi-FASTA passed via --fasta. Sequences are taken as consecutive (A,B) pairs in file order. pair_id = first header minus the standard A/B/1/2 suffix.
